_comment_generic_template: This is a TEMPLATE for configuring bitbucket-dc-mcp in an
MCP-compatible client (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, etc.).
1. Copy this file to your MCP client config location
2. Replace EVERY placeholder value with your real values
3. Do NOT put real tokens directly in the 'env' section in
production; instead, source them from a secret store and
export them in the environment that launches your MCP client,
or use a client that supports secret-store placeholders.
See README.md for the list of supported environment variables
and SECURITY.md for the threat model and deployment requirements.
